pop.description: Pop music is characterized by catchy melodies, verse-chorus structure, and broad mainstream appeal. Typically features polished production, strong hooks, and upbeat or relatable themes.

lofi.description: Lo-fi (low fidelity) hip-hop blends mellow beats, vinyl crackle, and jazzy samples to create a relaxed, nostalgic atmosphere. Often used for studying or unwinding.

rock.description: Rock music is driven by electric guitars, strong rhythms, and an emphasis on live performance energy. Ranges from classic rock to alternative, grunge, and hard rock.

jazz.description: Jazz is an improvisational genre rooted in blues and swing, featuring complex harmonies, syncopated rhythms, and expressive solos. Creates sophisticated, relaxed, or atmospheric moods.

ambient.description: Ambient music prioritizes texture, atmosphere, and mood over traditional melody or rhythm. Creates immersive soundscapes for focus, relaxation, or meditation.

metal.description: Metal is a high-intensity genre defined by heavy distorted guitars, aggressive drumming, and powerful vocals. Emphasizes technical skill and emotional catharsis.

edm.description: Electronic Dance Music (EDM) is built around synthesized sounds, programmed beats, and high-energy drops designed to fill dancefloors. Includes sub-genres like house, techno, and dubstep.

synthwave.description: Synthwave is a retrowave genre inspired by 1980s film soundtracks, featuring analog synthesizers, driving basslines, and nostalgic atmosphere.

indie pop.description: Indie pop blends the melodic sensibility of pop with independent, DIY production aesthetics. Often features introspective lyrics, jangly guitars, and a warm, personal sound.

classical.description: Classical music spans centuries of orchestral and chamber compositions emphasizing formal structure, dynamic contrast, and emotional depth without vocals.

hip-hop.description: Hip-hop combines rhythmic vocal delivery (rap) over sampled or produced beats. Covers a wide emotional range from introspective to hype, with strong cultural roots.

r&b.description: Rhythm and Blues (R&B) fuses soul, funk, and pop elements with smooth vocals, rich harmonies, and groove-oriented production.

country.description: Country music emphasizes storytelling, twangy guitars, and themes of rural life, love, and loss. Ranges from traditional to modern country-pop crossovers.

funk.description: Funk is a groove-heavy genre emphasizing syncopated basslines, rhythmic guitar, and tight ensemble playing. Created to make people dance.

folk.description: Folk music is rooted in acoustic instrumentation and narrative songwriting traditions. Emphasizes authenticity, storytelling, and emotional intimacy.

mood_context.happy: Upbeat, positive, feel-good energy. Good for social settings, morning routines, and activities that benefit from positive reinforcement.
mood_context.chill: Relaxed, laid-back, low-stress. Ideal for winding down, background listening, or any context requiring calm focus.
mood_context.intense: High arousal, focused aggression or passion. Best for peak-performance moments like workouts or competitive gaming.
mood_context.romantic: Warm, intimate, emotionally expressive. Suited for date nights, quiet evenings, or reflective moments.
mood_context.nostalgic: Evokes memory and longing. Good for introspection, road trips, or revisiting personal history.
mood_context.peaceful: Serene and calming. Ideal for meditation, sleep, or stress recovery.
mood_context.focused: Mentally engaging without distraction. Best for deep work, studying, or creative flow states.
mood_context.energetic: High physical energy, movement-oriented. Great for exercise, dancing, or high-activity tasks.
mood_context.angry: Cathartic, high-intensity release. Useful for stress relief through aggressive musical expression.
mood_context.moody: Atmospheric, emotionally ambiguous. Suits introspective or creative contexts.
mood_context.relaxed: Gentle, unhurried pace. Good for casual afternoons, light social settings, or unwinding.
